title: FrostBite
description: This is the FrostBite Modpack, we aim to give you a vanilla feeling, but with more features that polish the game and expand the gameplay.
body:
FrostBite Modpack

This Modpack was intended as an expansion of vanilla Minecraft, not too much, but also not to little. *Still in Alpha!*

Recommendations & Features

* Recommended Shader Settings:
https://www.dropbox.com/s/vix7fszw68jmx00/ComplementaryReimagined_r2.2_settings.txt?dl=0
You can either just use these settings, customize the shader on your own, or just install another shader. But these are the preferred shader settings. To import these settings: Download the [file](https://www.dropbox.com/s/vix7fszw68jmx00/ComplementaryReimagined_r2.2_settings.txt?dl=0). After that head into the game, click on: Options -> Video Settings -> Shader Packs... -> Shader Pack Settings -> Import settings from file (top-left) and then select the file.

Important Information

- The Modpack comes with a shader that is automatically enabled.
This can be pretty resource heavy. To disable the shader: Options -> Video Settings -> Shader Packs... -> Shaders:Enabled (By clicking it switches to Disabled). - For legal complaints or for similar issues please send me a message via Discord (arktikus) or Twitter (ArktikusT).

Running a server

***Still Experimental***
1. Download the [server.zip](https://www.dropbox.com/s/iwk1cf8gvgpqwgm/frostbite_server_0.0.3.zip?dl=0) and install it on your desired machine. 2. Extract the .zip into a folder. 3. Open the folder and either run the `launch.bat` for Windows
or the `launch.sh` for Linux (`.\launch.sh`). * You should use 4-8GB RAM for optimal results. * A very early and experimental version, maybe crashes and breaks. * At the moment NO custom server settings. Just a basic server with the mods.

Used Mods, Resource Packs and Shader Packs

Click here!
